description_long: This is a tall, slender shampoo bottle with a gently curved, elongated body that tapers smoothly into a narrow neck. The bottle is predominantly white with a matte finish, featuring a black cylindrical cap on top. The front displays gold and pink text, with a prominent black and white label section near the base, indicating product details. The surface is smooth and hard, typical of plastic packaging, and the bottle appears to be opaque. There are no visible decorative graphics aside from the printed text and logo. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for personal care use in urban environments.
description: A tall, white, slender shampoo bottle with a black cap and minimalistic printed labeling on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold and pink brand text, black and white product label, and the black cap.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the bottle's smooth, curved profile and partial label visibility.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unmarked white surface and the bottle's continuous curvature.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with no visible label, highlighting the bottle's seamless, rounded shape.
attribute_label_text: SKHER BeZZI Resistent hair Redutor de Volume Controla o volume 1L e 33,8 fl.oz
attribute_bottle_silhouette: tall and slender with a gently curved body tapering into a narrow neck
